name: Web Development
cardSummary: Professional website development with modern technologies
description: Get a fully responsive, modern website built with the latest technologies. Our team specializes in React, Next.js, and other cutting-edge frameworks to deliver high-performance web applications tailored to your business needs. We focus on clean code, SEO optimization, and user experience.

name: Mobile App Design
cardSummary: Beautiful and intuitive mobile app interfaces
description: Beautiful and intuitive mobile app interfaces. User flows, high-fidelity screens, and design systems that translate smoothly into development handoff.

name: SEO Optimization
description: Boost your search engine rankings with technical SEO, content structure, and measurable improvements you can track over time.

name: Tutorías y refuerzo académico virtual
cardSummary: Sesiones en vivo personalizadas en áreas STEM y competencias digitales.
description: Sesiones en vivo personalizadas en áreas STEM y competencias digitales, con seguimiento y recursos de repaso.

name: Asesoría legal para emprendedores
cardSummary: Revisión de contratos y orientación en propiedad intelectual.
description: Revisión de contratos, constitución de sociedad y orientación en propiedad intelectual para proyectos digitales.

name: Branding e identidad visual
cardSummary: Naming, paleta y manual básico de marca.
description: Naming, paleta, tipografías y manual básico de marca para alinear tu presencia web y redes sociales.
